violations.text: (Potato Salad), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
Bowls were observed in the mop sink. PIC informed and move to warewashing area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (stove vents ) have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025
